hero.intro: A creative marketing agency that helps brands grow and connect with their audience through strategy, content, and design.

subHero.title: Why Marketly
subHero.body: Our vision is to become a [[leading creative marketing agency]] that inspires brands to grow and connect with their audience. We help businesses achieve real growth through [[creative marketing strategies]], powerful digital content, and data-driven campaigns—from social media and branding to SEO and content creation.

social.title: Social Media Marketing
social.desc: Managing social platforms and engaging content that connects brands with their audience.
social.detail: We build content calendars, community management, paid and organic campaigns, and clear reporting—so you see what works across Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, and more.

content.title: Content Creation
content.desc: Creative, on-brand marketing content that captures attention and drives action.
content.detail: From scripts and copy to visuals and motion, we produce assets tailored to each channel while keeping your voice consistent and your message sharp.

branding.title: Branding
branding.desc: Strong visual identities that help you stand out and stay memorable.
branding.detail: We define positioning, logo systems, color and type, and brand guidelines—everything needed for a cohesive look across digital and print touchpoints.

seo.title: SEO
seo.desc: Search optimization that improves visibility and brings qualified traffic.
seo.detail: Technical audits, keyword strategy, on-page optimization, and performance tracking help your site rank for the queries that matter to your business.

strategy.title: Marketing Strategy
strategy.desc: Data-backed plans that align channels, messaging, and growth goals.
strategy.detail: We map your audience, funnels, and KPIs, then prioritize tactics and budgets so every channel pulls in the same direction.

portfolio.heading: Portfolio highlights
portfolio.body: A few examples of how we combine strategy, design, and content to help brands show up clearly and convert with confidence.

items.title: Brand refresh for a modern agency
items.excerpt: A new visual system, messaging direction, and scalable components for consistent campaigns.

items.title: Social content series that drives engagement
items.excerpt: A weekly format with templates, hooks, and reporting to iterate fast across platforms.

items.title: High-converting landing page redesign
items.excerpt: Improved structure, faster performance, and stronger CTAs with a clean, premium look.

items.title: SEO foundation + content roadmap
items.excerpt: Technical cleanup, keyword mapping, and a content plan built around real search intent.

items.title: Campaign creative for product launch
items.excerpt: Cross-channel assets designed for clarity, consistency, and quick iteration.

items.title: Channel strategy and performance tracking
items.excerpt: A measurement framework that connects creative output to KPIs and next actions.

items.title: How to build a content strategy that converts
items.excerpt: A practical framework for planning topics, mapping journeys, and measuring results without guesswork.

items.title: Design systems for marketing teams: what to standardize
items.excerpt: Create reusable UI patterns that speed up production while keeping campaigns consistent across channels.

items.title: SEO basics in plain language (and how to start today)
items.excerpt: Learn what matters most: intent, structure, and performance—and turn it into an action plan you can ship.

items.title: Writing hooks that earn attention in 5 seconds
items.excerpt: Improve clarity and curiosity with repeatable formulas for headlines, intros, and social captions.

items.title: Turning analytics into better creative decisions
items.excerpt: A lightweight process to connect engagement data to creative iterations and content quality over time.

items.title: Brand consistency across websites, emails, and ads
items.excerpt: Keep messaging and visuals aligned by defining voice, components, and approvals that scale with your team.

about.heading: A team built for modern marketing
about.story: We help brands grow through strategy, content, and design that feels human and performs. Our process balances creative thinking with measurable outcomes—so every campaign has a clear purpose and a clear result.
about.visionBody: To become a leading creative marketing agency that inspires brands to grow and connect with their audience.
about.missionBody: Helping businesses achieve real growth through creative marketing strategies and powerful digital content.

team.name: Content Strategist
team.bio: Turns brand goals into content plans, messaging, and a roadmap your team can execute.

team.name: Social Media Manager
team.bio: Builds calendars, manages communities, and optimizes campaigns across platforms.

team.name: Designer
team.bio: Creates on-brand visuals and systems that keep every touchpoint consistent.

team.name: Programmer
team.bio: Ships fast, accessible experiences—landing pages, websites, and performance improvements.

contact.heading: Let’s talk about your next project
contact.body: Tell us what you’re building and what success looks like. We’ll get back to you with next steps and a clear plan.

aboutPage.heading: About Marketly
aboutPage.subtitle: A creative marketing agency that helps brands grow and connect with their audience through strategy, content, and design.

teamPage.heading: Meet the people behind Marketly
teamPage.subtitle: Strategists, creators, and builders who plan campaigns, craft content, and ship experiences that help your brand grow.

members.name: Jordan Ellis
members.bio: Sets the agency direction, nurtures client partnerships, and keeps strategy, creative, and delivery working as one team.

members.name: Sam Rivera
members.bio: Turns brand goals into messaging frameworks, editorial plans, and measurable content roadmaps your stakeholders can trust.

members.name: Morgan Lee
members.bio: Connects audience insights to channel plans, so every touchpoint reinforces the story and moves people toward action.

members.name: Casey Nguyen
members.bio: Runs calendars, community, and paid social with clear reporting—balancing brand voice with platform-native creative.

members.name: Riley Brooks
members.bio: Shapes visual systems and campaign assets that stay recognizable across web, social, and print without feeling repetitive.

members.name: Taylor Kim
members.bio: Builds fast, accessible sites and landing pages, then tunes performance and analytics so marketing can see what converts.
